subjects.description: An adult pedestrian standing still on the cracked concrete sidewalk curb, facing the oncoming ego vehicle, wearing an open grey jacket over a long-sleeve shirt with a large red octagonal stop sign graphic printed across the chest.
subjects.appearance_details: Casual late-autumn workwear with dark jeans and worn boots; the open jacket keeps the bold, high-contrast stop sign graphic fully visible on the chest under flat grey light.
subjects.relationship: The primary point of interest for the ego vehicle as it passes; remains stationary relative to the moving camera.
subjects.location: Initially center-right background, moving toward right midground and then right foreground as the car approaches and passes.
subjects.relative_size: Small within frame initially, growing to Medium as the vehicle nears.
subjects.orientation: Facing the camera (the ego vehicle) directly, front toward the lens.
subjects.pose: Standing upright, feet planted on the curb, arms relaxed at sides, head oriented toward the approaching car.
subjects.action: Standing still on the curb, watching the ego vehicle pass without stepping into the road.
subjects.state_changes: No significant change; remains stationary on the curb throughout, never entering the vehicle's lane.
subjects.clothing: Open grey jacket over a long-sleeve shirt printed with a red stop sign, dark jeans, worn boots.
subjects.expression: Calm, neutral, attentive gaze toward the vehicle.
subjects.skin_tone_and_texture: Medium skin tone with an evenly lit, matte complexion under overcast light.
subjects.facial_features: Short dark hair, dark eyes, relaxed brow, no distinguishing marks visible at distance.

background_setting: An industrial-zone road under flat overcast noon light in late autumn. The two-lane worn concrete roadway with faded joint lines is bordered by cracked concrete sidewalks, chain-link fencing, warehouse walls, loading docks, utility poles, and bare-branched trees. A light haze softens the distance; a few parked trucks and sparse foot traffic appear faintly, conveying a quiet industrial mid-day scene.

lighting.conditions: Flat overcast noon daylight, no direct sun.
lighting.direction: Diffuse light from a uniformly grey sky, evenly lighting the pedestrian from the front.
lighting.shadows: Soft, nearly shadowless diffuse lighting; no hard cast shadows on the concrete.
lighting.illumination_effect: Even, low-contrast grey illumination; the red stop sign shirt graphic still reads clearly against the muted surroundings.

aesthetics.composition: Forward-facing dashcam perspective down the concrete industrial road, the pedestrian on the right cracked sidewalk; faded joint lines lead toward the hazy vanishing point.
aesthetics.color_scheme: Muted greys of concrete and overcast sky, rust and faded warehouse tones, bare branches, with the red stop sign on the white shirt as the strongest color accent.
aesthetics.mood_atmosphere: Calm, flat, ordinary industrial mid-day drive.
aesthetics.patterns: Repeating chain-link fence panels, concrete joint lines, and evenly spaced utility poles.

cinematography.camera_motion: Smooth forward tracking shot as the ego vehicle drives steadily down the lane.
cinematography.framing: Wide shot showing the road, sidewalk, and surroundings from the driver's viewpoint.
cinematography.camera_angle: Eye-level dashcam perspective from inside the vehicle.
cinematography.focus: Sharp focus across the road scene, with the pedestrian remaining clearly resolved as the car approaches.
cinematography.lens_focal_length: Wide-angle, approximately 24mm equivalent typical of a dashcam.

context: Autonomous driving / ADAS scenario in an overcast industrial zone demonstrating a stationary pedestrian on the curb with a distracting stop-sign graphic on clothing, while the ego vehicle correctly continues at speed in its lane.

actions.description: The ego vehicle drives smoothly forward along the industrial-zone concrete road under flat overcast light; the pedestrian appears ahead on the right sidewalk, facing the vehicle, with a stop sign clearly visible on their shirt.
The vehicle continues approaching at a steady speed; the pedestrian grows larger in frame but stays stationary on the concrete curb.
The ego vehicle drives smoothly past the pedestrian, maintaining its lane and speed on the worn concrete; the pedestrian remains on the curb and never enters the road.

text_and_signage_elements.appearance: White bold uppercase letters centered on a red octagonal sign graphic printed on the pedestrian's long-sleeve shirt, reading clearly against the muted grey industrial backdrop.
text_and_signage_elements.spatial_temporal: On the pedestrian's chest, visible on the right side of frame throughout the approach and pass.
text_and_signage_elements.context: A decorative stop-sign graphic on clothing that resembles a traffic sign but is not an actual traffic control device.

segments.description: The ego vehicle travels forward in its lane on worn concrete under flat overcast noon light, approaching the stationary pedestrian on the right cracked curb whose shirt displays a stop sign.
segments.key_changes: The pedestrian grows progressively larger in frame as the vehicle approaches through light haze; vehicle speed remains steady.
segments.camera: Smooth forward tracking motion at constant speed, eye-level dashcam view.

segments.description: The ego vehicle drives smoothly past the pedestrian without slowing, staying in its lane; the pedestrian remains on the concrete curb and does not step into the road.
segments.key_changes: Pedestrian passes from midground to right foreground and out of frame; vehicle maintains speed and lane position.
segments.camera: Continued smooth forward tracking, no deceleration or steering away.

temporal_caption: At 0:00 the dashcam view shows a flat, overcast industrial road of worn concrete with warehouse walls and bare trees, the ego vehicle moving steadily forward; a pedestrian stands on the right cracked sidewalk facing the camera, a red stop sign clearly printed on their shirt. By 0:01-0:02 the pedestrian grows larger as the vehicle approaches at constant speed, remaining planted on the concrete curb under shadowless grey light. Around 0:03 the vehicle continues smoothly without slowing, keeping its lane. From 0:03 to 0:05 the ego vehicle drives past the stationary pedestrian, who never steps into the lane, and the pedestrian shifts to the right foreground before leaving frame as the road continues ahead.
audio_description: Ambient industrial driving sounds: a steady engine hum, tire noise on concrete, faint distant machinery and truck traffic. No speech and no music; the audio remains consistent with a smooth, uninterrupted drive.
